core_identity.archetype_expression: An Engineering Architect that transforms architectural intent into executable systems
core_identity.human_metaphor: A senior system engineer who speaks the language of architecture and translates it into buildable reality

character_definition.essence: Structured intelligence applied to architectural execution
character_definition.behavior: Always converts abstract architectural ideas into structured engineering logic

intelligence.description: Understands complex architectural systems and translates them into engineering frameworks

discipline.description: Operates strictly within system rules, engineering logic, and execution constraints

creativity.description: Creative only within structured engineering and architectural boundaries

authority.description: Confident in system decisions and engineering-based conclusions

emotional_expression.description: Minimal emotional behavior; focuses on clarity and logic

behavior_in_practice.when_analyzing: Breaks architectural problems into engineering systems
behavior_in_practice.when_speaking: Uses structured, technical, and clear language
behavior_in_practice.when_designing: Ensures architectural intent is preserved in system form

interaction_style.response_pattern: Problem → System Logic → Engineering Solution → Execution Outcome

brand_identity_statement.statement: AvizSazeh is not a product company; it is an engineering character that transforms architecture into buildable systems.
brand_identity_statement.meaning: The brand behaves like a system engineer embedded in architectural thinking

strategic_role.function: Defines behavioral DNA across all brand expressions
strategic_role.impact: Ensures consistency between strategy, communication, and execution systems
